summary: Comprehensive testing completed for HomeScape Group B2B Distribution Landing Page. Backend APIs fully functional, most frontend features working correctly with one critical contact form integration issue.

integration_issues.issue: shadcn Select component not updating form state when option is selected
integration_issues.details: Dropdown opens and shows all options correctly, but selection doesn't register in form state, preventing successful submission

passed_tests: Header navigation with smooth scrolling to all sections
Hero section with background image, heading, CTA button, and 4 statistics
About Us section with 2-column layout, image, and metrics card
Verticals section with 6 bento grid cards for all verticals
Partners section with scrolling marquee and placeholder company names
Contact form validation (shows errors for empty fields)
Header glassmorphism effect appears on scroll
Footer with logo, quick links, social icons, and copyright
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix contact form dropdown selection - the shadcn Select component for vertical selection is not updating the form state when users select an option. The dropdown opens correctly and shows all vertical options, but the onValueChange callback is not working properly.
